urdu transliteration text:
Qabr Asghar Ke Bananay Mei Bohat Dayr Lagi
It Took A Long Time To Dig Asghar's Grave
Shah Ko Ek Chand Chupanay Mei Bohat Dayr Lagi
english translation text: It Took A Long Time For Shah (The Imam) To Bury A Moon (Asghar AS)

urdu transliteration text: Shah Ne Har Laash Ko Jaldi Se Uthaya Laykin
english translation text: Shah (Imam) Lifted Every Corpse With Ease, But...

urdu transliteration text: Laash Akbar Ke Uthanay Me Bohat Dayr Lagi
english translation text: It A Long Time To Lift The Corpse Of Akbar

urdu transliteration text:
Qabr Asghar Ke Bananay Mei Bohat Dayr Lagi
It Took A Long Time To Dig Asghar's Grave
Tukrey Chunte Huwe Qasim Ke Kaha Maula Ne
english translation text: Picking Up The Pieces Of Qasim, Our Master Said:

urdu transliteration text: Hai Afsos Ke Aanay Mei Bohat Dayr Lagi
english translation text: Woe! It Took Us Too Long To Come (To Your Rescue)

urdu transliteration text:
Qabr Asghar Ke Bananay Mei Bohat Dayr Lagi
It Took A Long Time To Dig Asghar's Grave
Kis Qadar Pyas Se Sookha Tha Gulu E Sarwar
english translation text: How Parched, From Thirst, Was The Neck Of Sarwar

urdu transliteration text: Shimr Ko Taygh Chala Ne Mei Bohat Dayr Lagi
english translation text: It Took Long For Shimr To Slash It With The Dagger

urdu transliteration text:
Qabr Asghar Ke Bananay Mei Bohat Dayr Lagi
It Took A Long Time To Dig Asghar's Grave

Karbala Jaake Takallum Ne Yahi Poocha Tha
Upon Reaching Karbala, The Asker (Poet) Asked
Mujh Ko Sarkar Bulanay Mei Bohat Dayr Lagi
english translation text: Master, It Took Long For You To Invite Me

urdu transliteration text:
Qabr Asghar Ke Bananay Mei Bohat Dayr Lagi
It Took A Long Time To Dig Asghar's Grave
